name: Ping An Fund Management Company - CSI Live Stock Breeding Fund
summary: Ping An Fund Management Company - CSI Live Stock Breeding Fund is a fund that invests in companies related to the livestock breeding industry, tracking the CSI Live Stock Breeding Index. Managed by Ping An Fund Management Company, it aims to provide investors with exposure to companies involved in animal husbandry, breeding technologies, and related services within China. This fund capitalizes on the growing demand for meat and dairy products in the Chinese market.
